block_00: “If dropped from high enough, even a dead cat will bounce back”
block_01: This pattern gets its unusual name from an old Wall Street saying. Every trending market has periods of short pullbacks, when the price goes in the opposite direction. This pattern is a short recovery of the price in a declining market.
block_02: We promise that no cats were harmed in the making of this article. How to trade such a pattern and what does it signal? Read the full version to find out.
